title: Time Tracking - Drill Down to Items
excerpt: We love the time tracking feature and use it measure team efficiencies.  It would be helpful, if from the dashboard, we could group by Item or even click on the Status group and drill down to the individual items. We nee…

posts.author: NBRunner73 (Nicole Bishop)
posts.cookedHtml:
We love the time tracking feature and use it measure team efficiencies. It would be helpful, if from the dashboard, we could group by Item or even click on the Status group and drill down to the individual items. We need to be able to see the details not just the summary.

The filter in the individual boards doesn’t look at the dates associated with the Time Tracker so we can’t use that to find the details either.

posts.author: llevito (Leslie Levito)
posts.cookedHtml: This is such a big pain point for us!!! We really hope it gets resolved

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, my team actually created a custom coded solution in this area. It’s a board view that allows you to choose time tracking columns on multiple boards to pull excel reports from where the time is grouped by person/board. Maybe it’ll help some teams out. It’s a private app and just a prototype for now but you can install it with this link. Let me know if you find it useful.
